/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ecu_platform.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ecu_platform.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecu_platform.dir/src/transport/Transport_CAN_Linux.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecu_platform.dir/src/core/CAN_Dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecu_platform.dir/src/isotp/ISOTP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ecu_platform.dir/src/uds/UDS_Client.cpp.o -o ecu_platform
